overall.description: A high-quality game engine cinematic depicting a medieval fantasy wooden pavilion with robed characters. The stationary camera captures the interior of a heavy timber-framed structure open to a grassy landscape, with dramatic natural sunlight casting shadows across the stone floor.

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing robed figures moving within the timber pavilion

notable_agents.action: robed figure with red hood trim walking from right to left across the pavilion
figure standing near wooden table with hand raised in gesturing motion

entered.detail: massive dark wooden support beams and rafters forming the open-air pavilion structure
grey stone paving tiles covering the ground with sunlight patterns
rustic wooden tables and benches arranged throughout the interior space
sunlit green grass and trees visible through the large open archway
dark wooden door with stone frame set into the right wall
green leafy plants in containers along the left side wall
wooden box lanterns suspended from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a medieval wooden pavilion with heavy timber framing and stone flooring. Several robed figures move about the space, with one notable figure in red-trimmed robes crossing from right to left. Sunlight streams in from the open sides illuminating the grassy landscape beyond, while hanging lanterns and potted plants decorate the interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static cinematic view of a medieval wooden pavilion where the interplay of light and shadow defines a serene interior. It begins by capturing the heavy timber framing and stone flooring of the structure, while robed figures move quietly through the space. As a figure in red-trimmed robes crosses from right to left, the camera emphasizes the depth of the room decorated with hanging lanterns and potted plants. The scene then opens toward the perimeter, where bright sunlight streams through the open sides to illuminate a lush, grassy landscape beyond the pavilion.
